S.FORM: == Fred Beretta == Fred Beretta sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1917 , ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 1, Fred Beretta, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1962) Fred Beretta, t'aring kawas tay 1940 tehuk kawas tay 1937, mqwas biru sa Purdue pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == *re* ОІeretta == *re* ОІeretta s~Й•raral Д§jaК”ЙЈa s~Й•is~Й•juw na nОІa. kawas~Й• taj **** , rjax s~Й•a taj ** nqu taj *, *re* ОІeretta, s~Й•quliq na pК”unro. (mД§uqil s~Й•a kawas~Й• taj ****) *re* ОІeretta, tК”ariЕӢ kawas~Й• taj **** teД§uk kawas~Й• taj ****, mqwas~Й• ОІiru s~Й•a pur*ue pqws~Й•an ОІiru kraД§u. КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* national ОІas~Й•ketОІall as~Й•s~Й•oКҰ~КЁiation plajers~Й•

(mhuqil sa kawas tay 1962) Fred Beretta, t'aring kawas tay 1940 tehuk kawas tay 1937, mqwas biru sa Purdue pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

(mД§uqil s~Й•a kawas~Й• taj ****) *re* ОІeretta, tК”ariЕӢ kawas~Й• taj **** teД§uk kawas~Й• taj ****, mqwas~Й• ОІiru s~Й•a pur*ue pqws~Й•an ОІiru kraД§u.
